privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.description: What is currently public or shared via link — with kill switch.

feedback.label: Feedback
feedback.description: How you appear in the feedback feed — owl pseudonym, real name, karma.

reset_all_private.label: Reset all to private
reset_all_private.keywords: kill-switch, kill switch, reset, private, revoke

feedback_karma.label: Karma & Tier

general.title: General
general.week_start_description: First day of the week in calendars
general.onboarding_description: Pick name, look and modules again

ai.title: AI options
ai.description: Choose which AI layers Mana is allowed to use — from none to all
ai.tier_local_description: Mana also works completely without AI: date detection, search and simple classification run via classic algorithms. Some functions are limited then, but everything is 100% offline and free.
ai.tier_browser_bullet_1: 100% local — data never leaves your device
ai.tier_browser_bullet_3: Needs WebGPU + 2 GB free GPU memory
ai.tier_browser_blocked: WebGPU not available in your browser. Works in Chrome/Edge 113+ or Safari 18+.
ai.tier_mana_server_bullet_1: Faster and stronger than browser LLM
ai.tier_mana_server_bullet_2: Data flows encrypted to our server
ai.tier_byok_subtitle: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini or Mistral
ai.tier_byok_bullet_1: Direct from the browser — no Mana server in between
ai.tier_byok_bullet_2: You pay the provider, we see nothing
ai.tier_byok_bullet_3: Keys are stored encrypted in your vault
ai.tier_cloud_subtitle: Cloud API via our server proxy
ai.tier_cloud_consent_desc: Cloud requests send your content to Google. Please confirm that you understand and accept this.
ai.summary_local_only: Only local (no AI) — most AI features are limited.
ai.fallback_description: If the chosen AI layer can't answer a request, Mana will try the local variant (if available). Off: shows an error instead.
ai.show_source_title: Show source on every AI result
ai.show_source_description: Shows a small marker under every AI-generated answer like "On your device" or "via Google Gemini" — so you always see where your data was processed.

byok.vault_locked: Vault is locked — please sign in first to manage keys.
byok.label_required: Label and API key are required

privacy.title: Privacy overview
privacy.description: All entries you currently show publicly or share via link — with one-click rollback.
privacy.empty: Nothing is currently public or shared via link — well done.
privacy.confirm_one: {count} entry will be reset to "Space". Active share links will be revoked. Continue?
privacy.confirm_other: {count} entries will be reset to "Space". Active share links will be revoked. Continue?

sync.title: Cloud Sync
sync.description: Sync your data across all devices
sync.deactivate_confirm: Really deactivate Cloud Sync? Your data stays available locally.
sync.status_insufficient: Not enough credits — top up to continue
sync.status_local_only: Your data is only stored locally on this device
sync.change_hint: Change applies from the next charge
sync.footnote: Cloud Sync syncs your data encrypted across all devices. Local data always stays — even when sync is paused or deactivated.

mydata.title: My data (GDPR)
mydata.description: Overview of all the data we store about you
mydata.footnote_pre: No tracking cookies — anonymous analytics via Umami. Details in the
mydata.retention_description: How long we keep your data
mydata.danger_delete_desc: Permanently deletes your account and all related data across all projects. Cannot be undone.

tag_presets.title: Tag presets
tag_presets.hint: Saved tag sets you can pick as a starter template when creating a new space. Changes to a preset don't affect already-created spaces — it's a one-way copy.
tag_presets.empty: No presets yet. Create the first one by giving the current tag set a name — it will then be used automatically as the default for new spaces.

vault.title: Encryption
vault.description: Sensitive fields are encrypted with AES-GCM-256 before being written to the local database.
vault.status_unlocked_pre: Your personal key is loaded on this device.
vault.status_locked: Your key isn't loaded. Encrypted content can't be read until you sign in again or load the key manually.
vault.status_error: There was a problem loading your encryption key. Please sign in again or check your internet connection.
vault.toast_rotated: Key rotated. New writes will use the new key.
vault.err_code_mismatch: The entered code doesn't match the one shown.
vault.threat_never_body: your encrypted content (chat, notes, dreams, memos, contact details, cycle notes, transaction descriptions, …). It only leaves your device as an unreadable blob.
vault.threat_could_body: your master key, if an employee with access to the key-encryption key actively reaches for it. In practice this is protected against all realistic threats except a court-ordered disclosure against Mana itself.
vault.threat_visible_body: the count of your notes / chats / contacts, timestamps, links between records. Not the content itself.
vault.fields_description: Which columns in which tables are stored encrypted on the device. Structural metadata (IDs, timestamps, status flags) intentionally stays in plaintext so indexes, sorting and sync keep working.
vault.zk_desc_body_pre: In zero-knowledge mode Mana stores your key
vault.zk_desc_body_em: only in a form we ourselves can't decrypt
vault.zk_desc_body_post: . When signing in from a new device you'll need your recovery code to unlock your data.
vault.zk_pro_body: even a Mana employee with full server access can no longer read your content.
vault.zk_con_body: if you lose the recovery code, your data is gone for good — we no longer have a backup key.
vault.zk_existing_warn: You already have a recovery code stored, but zero-knowledge mode isn't active yet. You can enable it directly or reset the code.
vault.step_1_desc_pre: Store this code in a safe place (password manager, printed in a vault, …).
vault.step_2_desc: Type (or paste) the code you just saved. This way we make sure the backup is really complete.
vault.step_3_desc_pre: If you enable now, the server deletes its copy of your key. From this point on you can
vault.step_3_desc_strong: only access your encrypted data with the recovery code
vault.step_3_warn: This action cannot be undone without the recovery code. If you misplace your code, your content is lost.
vault.zk_active_note: The server can no longer decrypt your data. The next time you sign in on a new device, you'll be asked for your recovery code.
vault.rotate_step_strong: Your old code is no longer valid.
vault.rotate_step_desc: Save the new code in a safe place before leaving this page — we only show it once.
vault.zk_disable_desc: To restore the server-side key, we need your currently loaded master key. It's currently in your browser — we'll send it to the server once, which will re-wrap it with the KEK.
vault.rotate_section_warn_body_pre: When rotating, a new key is generated. Data encrypted with the old key won't be readable afterwards — unless it was decrypted and re-written with the new key. Mana currently does
vault.rotate_section_warn_em: not perform this re-encrypt step automatically
vault.rotate_section_when: When to use? If you suspect your device was compromised, or as a regular security practice after signing in from an unknown location.
